name: Arizer Extreme Q Remote Control
summary: Arizer Extreme Q Remote Control — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: The Arizer Extreme Q Remote Control, with a range of up to 20 feet, allows for easy management of the vaporiser's power, light, fan speed, timer, 9 pre-programmed temperature settings, and audio features. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
